ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the customer is enrolled in */,
  "loyalty_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer in the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the purchase */,
  "diff" REAL /* Difference in price due to the discount */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "discount_name" TEXT /* Name of the discount (e.g., loyalty discount, promotional discount) */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage of the discount */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage off, fixed amount off) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the purchase */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product in the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_items_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, sales representative) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view sales reports, edit customer data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "sales_data" TEXT /* Sales data included in the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_per_dollar" INTEGER /* Number of points earned per dollar spent */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the program expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_loyalty" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the customer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the loyalty points were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loyalty_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., email, phone call, in-person visit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
